response.justification: The candidate brings genuine geospatial domain depth (founder of an open-source geo-data platform, GIS work for Green Map, FOSS4G speaker) and real systems-level experience writing low-latency, high-throughput services in DLang at Sociomantic. However, the role's primary requirement is modern C++ or Rust, and his professional C++ work dates to 2015 and was brief; the last several years have been TypeScript/Node product work. He also has no direct routing or navigation-guidance pipeline experience, so the fit rests on transferability of adjacent skills rather than demonstrated expertise.
strengths: Deep geospatial/GIS domain experience, including founding and operating an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Low-latency distributed systems work in DLang (async I/O, caching, fibers) handling millions of requests per second
Strong quality-engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, and author of open-source testing frameworks
concerns: No recent modern C++ or any Rust experience; last professional C++ role ended in 2015
No direct experience with routing engines, routing tiles, or navigation guidance systems
Recent career centered on TypeScript/Node web products, plus a current employment gap
